capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复强调仓位与生存优先。2024-08-05: "the name of the game remains capital preservation"；2025-08-25: "vaporware but I fumbled generational entry and couldn't size enough"，说明他明确把仓位大小当成核心决策变量。
2025-11-14: "bought some coins if it keeps going down simply assume I exited safely with no losses whatsoever"。虽然语气带玩笑，但底层逻辑很清楚：错了就走，不恋战。
2024-08-05 在极弱环境下他没有无脑抄底，而是先加一句 "if you're able to"，随后强调 "capital preservation"，这更像是只允许小试、绝不重仓接刀。
2024-08-05: "Though today may be grim, And tomorrow hard to foresee"，先定义当前为高不确定/高波动环境，再推出保守操作；这符合先做 regime 判断再决定风险暴露。
2024-02-14: "make TREE services an unmissable trading tool for every profitable trader in a post-ETF Crypto world"。他明确把后 ETF 时代的机构流入/结构变化当成交易框架的一部分。
多条推文都在下跌背景下讨论防守而非激进抄底，例如 2025-11-14: "if this is the easy road I'm driving myself into a ditch"，以及 2024-08-05 的 grim/foresee 表述，说明他会先承认下行 regime，再调整行为。
2025-08-25: "short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations"。这不是经典抛物线图形表述，但本质上是在做发行/叙事过热后的反向交易，和过度扩张后的衰竭思维一致。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Narrative Newsflow Arbitrage
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trade around fast-moving headlines, ecosystem updates, founder behavior, and sentiment shifts before they are fully priced by the market.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕头条、生态更新、创始人行为和情绪切换做快速定价偏差交易，在市场完全消化前完成布局或减仓。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 连续讨论 Bittensor/$TAO 事件："Bittensor is a quite a LOT more than Subnet 3"、"Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens"、"Here is how I think the Bittensor $TAO situation will play out from here"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Insider Listing Fade
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 内幕上所高估值反手做空
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Fade newly listed tokens or promoted assets when exchange/investor alignment, seed allocations, or insider incentives imply asymmetric sell pressure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当交易所、投资人、种子轮分配与内部人激励共同指向抛压时，反手做空新上所代币或被过度营销的资产。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-08-25: "it's an insider's game you can't win, so short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations"。这是非常明确、可执行的结构性交易规则。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Not There Yet
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Avoid forcing longs before crowd sentiment or narrative participation has meaningfully turned; use sentiment confirmation as a gate before size-up.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在群体情绪和叙事参与度尚未明显转强前，不提前重仓做多；把情绪确认当作加仓门槛。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-11: "Ok doesn’t seem sentiment there yet"。这句话非常像他的实时过滤条件，而不是事后评论。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Founder Sell-Pressure Overhang
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify protocol or token downside risk when founders, teams, or subnet owners receive extractive token flows likely to be sold into market strength.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当创始人、团队或生态拥有者获得可提取代币并存在明显套现激励时，识别其对价格形成的持续抛压风险。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-04-10: "Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens... So it is only logical those 37k $TAO will be dumped on the market for max extraction"。

personal_quirks.quote: the name of the game remains capital preservation
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先活下来，再谈抄底和收益；风险预算高于观点表达。

personal_quirks.quote: bought some coins if it keeps going down simply assume I exited safely with no losses whatsoever
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 试错可以，但不能让试错演变成扛单；错了立刻撤。

personal_quirks.quote: it's an insider's game you can't win, so short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 对带有明显内部分配优势和高估值发行的新币，默认采取反向视角。

personal_quirks.quote: Ok doesn’t seem sentiment there yet
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 没有情绪确认就不强行开大仓，等待 crowd participation 成型。

personal_quirks.quote: Though today may be grim, And tomorrow hard to foresee
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先承认环境不确定，再降低进攻性；不和 regime 对赌。

unique_traits: 他不像传统只发 K 线形态的 TA 号，更像把新闻流、生态结构、创始人激励和市场情绪整合成交易判断。相比纯技术派，他对“谁能卖、为什么会卖、市场是否已经知道”这类结构性问题更敏感。整体风格是信息优势驱动的反身性交易，而不是教科书式图形识别。

high_conviction_phrases: it's an insider's game you can't win
short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations
only logical those 37k $TAO will be dumped on the market
will carry on fine without it
